title: SCP-1471, MalO ver1.0.0
description: If you install this software, you will see it, and it will see you too...
body:
MalO ver1.0.0 adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-1471, also known as the MalO ver1.0.0.


This mysterious entity will appear if a player used a phone, which can be dropped by killing monsters. Upon using one of these devices, the installation of MalO ver1.0.0 begins. Once installed, MalO ver1.0.0 begins sending unsettling text messages such as “Can you see me?” or “I can see you.”. If you open the Phone again, you can see an Image of MalO ver1.0.0. Later on you will most likely encounter SCP-1471 in your world staring at you. If you look back, its gone, like it was just an imagination of your brain but soon on later, you will see it again...

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Is this mod safe?

Yes! This mod isn't a virus or anything else. It's just a mod that introduces SCP-1471 to your world if you used the new Phone item.

► How can I get a Phone?

Try to kill as many monsters as possible. The phone can be dropped by killing monsters with a 0.5% chance. 

► Where does SCP-1471 spawn?

SCP-1471 can spawn anywhere on the overworld near a player that already saw the image of SCP-1471 or slept and used the phone before, 

</details>



![SCP-1471](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10ac5ab61542b5fe50e1e0e5ee73a5e9a00125b3.png)

SCP-1471 manifests as a shadowy, wolf-like humanoid with a skull-like face. It only spawns once the software has been installed on the new Phone Item and the player already saw the Imagine of SCP-1471 or slept. SCP-1471 does not attack, instead it stalks the player, appearing nearby and watching silently. If you look at SCP-1471 or go too far away from it, it will disappear and most likely spawn again nearby. Due to his behavior, SCP-1471 cannot be contained. SCP-1471 stops from appearing if a player dies.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
